arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Tottenham Hotspur – Combined XI
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur do battle tonight in a Premier League London Derby at Stamford Bridge. There’s often no lack of incident when these teams meet, with plenty of needle between the capital neighbours. Ahead of tonight’s tie, we’ve selected our Chelsea and Tottenham Combined XI from the two squads. arts.ttl: Tottenham have been given clear route to signing – Enquiries arrived from England
arts.sum: Over the past few days, Tottenham Hotspur have been linked with a move for Genoa defender Koni de Winter. There was an indication that Ange Postecoglou’s side are leading the race for the versatile centre-back, who can also play at right-back. arts.ttl: Chelsea scouts could be set for Sunday transfer mission – Worry growing over transfer
arts.sum: Last week, Chelsea emerged as a target for Torino goalkeeper Vanja Milinkovic-Savic. While Manchester City have also been mentioned as a suitor for the Serbian, the report last week suggested that Enzo Maresca is keeping a close eye on Milinkovic-Savic, who has a release clause of €20m in the summer.
